CloudSync

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about CloudSync. Can't find your answer? Contact our support team.

General

CloudSync is a modern file synchronization platform designed for teams. It provides real-time file sync, collaboration tools, enterprise-grade security, and cross-platform apps for Mac, Windows, Linux, iOS, and Android.
CloudSync is built specifically for teams and enterprises. Our delta-sync engine is up to 10x faster than traditional sync, we offer granular permission controls, real-time co-editing, and enterprise security features like SSO/SAML and advanced audit logging — all in a single platform.

Pricing & Billing

Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings. When upgrading, you'll be prorated for the remaining billing period. When downgrading, the change takes effect at the next billing cycle.
We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, and bank transfers for annual Enterprise plans. All payments are processed securely through Stripe.
Yes, we offer 50% off for verified nonprofits and educational institutions. Contact our sales team with your organization details and we'll set up your discount within 24 hours.

Security & Privacy

All data is encrypted with AES-256 both at rest and in transit (TLS 1.3). Enterprise customers can also enable zero-knowledge encryption, where even CloudSync cannot access your files.
By default, data is stored in AWS data centers in the US (us-east-1) and EU (eu-west-1). Enterprise customers can choose their preferred data residency region to comply with local regulations like GDPR.
Yes. CloudSync is fully GDPR compliant. We have a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) available for all customers, support data residency in the EU, and provide tools for data export and deletion upon request.

Technical

CloudSync has native apps for macOS, Windows, Linux (Ubuntu, Fedora, Debian), iOS, and Android. We also have a full-featured web interface that works in all modern browsers. CLI tools are available for advanced users and CI/CD integrations.
Yes! We have a comprehensive REST API and webhooks for building custom integrations. API access is available on Professional and Enterprise plans. Check our developer documentation at docs.cloudsync.io for details.

Still have questions?

Our support team is here to help. Reach out anytime.

Contact Support
